name: Thai Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure all ingredients and set them aside.
2. Place the measured ingredients into your bread machine in the order specified by the manufacturer's instructions for Thai Bread recipe.
3. Select the appropriate cycle on the bread machine and start the machine.
4. The machine will mix, knead, and bake the dough until it is ready.
5. When the machine has finished baking, a 1.5 pound loaf of Thai Bread will be made.
